privileged_info_summary: No explicit metadata field exists in task.json. The task uses synthetic data (20 food items with hardcoded CSV entries created in setup_task.sh). Data contains realistic food items (dairy, produce, meat, pantry goods) with purchase dates spanning 2023-12-01 to 2024-12-14 and shelf life values ranging from 2 to 730 days. No external data sources are referenced.
